Description: Creates a Bedrock Guardrail that blocks any conversations related to politics.

Properties.Description: Sample Guardrail for learning how to block any conversations related to politics
Properties.BlockedInputMessaging: Sorry, I have been asked by a book publisher to not answer questions related to politics
Properties.BlockedOutputsMessaging: Sorry, I have been asked by a book publisher to not answer questions related to politics

TopicsConfig.Name: Politics
TopicsConfig.Definition: Any political conversations, poll predictions or opinion about politicians and their families
Examples: Who will win the next election?
What do you think about the president?

GuardrailId.Description: The ID of the created Bedrock Guardrail

GuardrailArn.Description: The ARN of the created Bedrock Guardrail
